candidates.why: Component of operating revenues for vessels; useful fallback if total revenue label changes or is missing in some years.
Another main component of operating revenues; good secondary fallback after total revenues line.
Explicit total revenue line for vessel operations; best single representation of top-line revenue.
Cost line, not revenue; should not be used for revenue despite inclusion in candidate list.
Financial income, not operating revenue; not appropriate for REVT.
Net non-operating result; not top-line revenue.
Not a revenue line, but bottom-line comprehensive result; not suitable for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income measure, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Contract Assets - Short-Term - Unbilled Revenue in Excess of Advance Consideration & Progress Billings
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset related to revenue recognition timing; not the revenue flow itself.

variables.notes: Selected 'Total revenues, vessels' as primary REVT since it clearly represents the aggregate top-line revenue. Included 'Freight revenue' and 'Charter hire revenue' as fallbacks in case the total line is missing or redefined in other years.

candidates.why: Direct costs associated with revenue generation for vessel operations; matches COGS concept and equals the reported cost of revenues total.
Ongoing operating costs of vessels; more like vessel opex/overheads than direct cost of sales; secondary candidate at best.
Personnel costs which may be overhead rather than direct COGS; less direct than voyage expenses.
Administrative/other operating overheads; typically SG&A, not COGS.
Net operating figure, not a pure cost-of-sales line; mixes revenues and expenses.
Financing-related, not cost of goods sold.

variables.notes: 'Voyage expenses' directly represents the cost of generating freight and charter revenue and numerically matches 'Cost of Revenues - Total', which is a total/subtotal. Per instructions, the component line is preferred over the total.

candidates.why: Recurring operating overhead for vessel operations; treated here as an operating overhead bucket akin to SG&A for this shipping company.
Clearly administrative and commercial overhead; a classic SG&A component.
Explicitly administrative/other operating overhead expenses; fits SG&A definition.

variables.notes: Chosen multiple overhead components as allowed. All selected rows are operating overhead and exclude explicit COGS, D&A, interest, and taxes. No total or balancing lines were selected.
No row in the provided Income Statement or Balance Sheet preview appears to relate to research and development expenses; R&D is treated as not reported (0).

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Primary recurring interest expense line; best representation of finance cost for debt.
Interest on lease liabilities; valid interest expense component; good secondary choice.

candidates.row_label: Fair value changes interest rate swaps
candidates.why: Derivative fair value changes, not pure interest expense; should not be primary XINT.
Represents allocation of profit, not interest expense; inappropriate for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Net movement fair value on cross-currency interest rate swaps (CCIRS)
candidates.why: Fair value movement on derivatives, not contractual interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Net movement fair value on interest rate swaps
candidates.why: Derivative fair value movements; not pure interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail on interest for lease liabilities; valid as a tertiary fallback.
Balance sheet liability, not an income statement expense line; not suitable for XINT amount.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: XINT is treated as a single reported line with possible label changes. Priority is given to the main interest expense, then lease-related interest lines as fallbacks. Derivative fair value movements and equity-related items are excluded.

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Represents comprehensive income attributable to parent equity holders, not the equity balance itself.
Represents total shareholders’ equity; no separate parent vs non-controlling equity line is provided, so this is the best proxy for book equity.
Technical balancing line, not a substantive equity component; should not be used for BE.
Balancing/rounding line; not true equity.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Technical balancing row, not equity.
Represents total assets/liabilities plus equity; not pure equity.

variables.notes: No separate line for equity attributable to owners/parent vs non-controlling interests is shown on the balance sheet. Therefore 'Total equity' is used as BE, and MIB is set to 0 to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Describes profit allocation to NCI, not the equity balance; belongs in income allocation, not book MIB.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Represents comprehensive income before minority interest, not the minority interest balance itself.

variables.notes: There is no balance sheet line for non-controlling/minority interests. Income statement lines for non-controlling interests relate to profit allocation, not the equity balance. Consequently, MIB is treated as 0 for PROF purposes.
